version_description: Fixed missing chord highlight that was missing and cleaned up headers.

versions.version_description: This version uses a capo on the 4th fret in order to play the hook similarly to the original.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]                        [ch]A#m[/ch]
City's breaking down on a camel's back.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]                               [ch]A#m[/ch]
They just have to go 'cause they don't know wack[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]                                [ch]A#m[/ch]
So all you fill the streets it's appealing to see[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]                                       [ch]A#m[/ch]
You wont get out the county, 'cos you're bad and free[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]                            [ch]A#m[/ch]
You've got a new horizon It's ephemeral style.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]                          [ch]A#m[/ch]
A melancholy town where we never smile.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]                          [ch]A#m[/ch]
And all I wanna hear is the message beep.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]                                        [ch]A#m[/ch]
My dreams, they've got to kiss, because I don't get sleep, no..[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]                  [ch]A#m[/ch]

[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]           [ch]A#m[/ch]

Take it all there on your stride[/tab]

Love forever love is free[/tab]

Let's turn forever you and me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]                 [ch]A#m[/ch]
Windmill, windmill for the land[/tab]
B  (Let ring)
Is everybody in?

[Verse]
(Timing is different here, chords same as first verse.)
[tab]                   [ch]D#m[/ch]
Laughing gas these hazmats, fast cats,[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#m[/ch]
Lining them up-a like ass cracks,[/tab]

Lay these ponies at the track[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#m[/ch]
Its my chocolate attack.[/tab]

[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]
Shit, I'm stepping in the heart of this here[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#m[/ch]
Care bear bumping in the heart of this here[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
Watch me as I gravitate[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#m[/ch]
Hahahahahahaa.[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab]                 [ch]D#m[/ch]
Yo, we gonna go, ghost town this motown with- [/tab]
[tab][ch]A#m[/ch]
yo sound, you're in the place. You gonna-[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
bite the dust, can't fight with us with-[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#m[/ch]
yo sound,You kill the INC.[/tab]

[tab]   [ch]D#m[/ch]
So don't stop, get it, get it[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#m[/ch]
Until you're Jet Ahead.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
Yo, watch the way I navigate[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#m[/ch]

[tab]   [ch]D#m[/ch]             [ch]A#m[/ch]
Shake it shake it, feel good[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G#m[/ch]             [ch]A#m[/ch]
shake it shake it, feel good[/tab]

[Instrumental break]
[ch]D#m[/ch] [ch]A#m[/ch] [ch]G#m[/ch] [ch]A#m[/ch] [x2]

[Chorus]
